title: Assistant Store Manager - Star Bazaar - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Star Bazaar - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Bazaar! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
